title: haworthia retusa var. magnifica
intro: Haworthia retusa var. magnifica, commonly known as the "Zebra Haworthia" or "Jade Plant," is a popular succulent species native to South Africa. This plant is not only aesthetically pleasing due to its unique striped pattern, but it also offers various health benefits, including air purification and stress relief. The therapeutic actions of Haworthia retusa var. magnifica include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, likely due to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The leaves of the Haworthia retusa var. magnifica plant contain flavonoids, including quercetin and kaempferol, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. side_effects: Haworthia retusa var. magnifica can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation and allergic reactions, especially when the sap of the plant comes into contact with open wounds.
